heading: Estimates for improvements in grounds
label: 2185 Estimates for improvements in grounds
text: All changes and improvements in the Capitol grounds, including approaches to the Capitol, shall be estimated for in detail, showing what modifications are proposed and the estimate cost of the same.
notes: CodificationSection was classified to section 173 of former Title 40, prior to the enactment of Title 40, Public Buildings, Property, and Works, by , , .Pub. L. 107–217, § 1116 Stat. 1062Aug. 21, 2002Section is based on act , popularly known as the “Sundry Civil Appropriation Act, fiscal year 1884”.Mar. 3, 1883
